data.evacuation_notes: The Interactive Evacuation Web Map is available here. CO 141 is closed to through traffic. A pilot car is guiding local residents from 10 a.m. to 10 p.m., with a full nighttime closure for all traffic at 10 p.m.

data.information:
The Evacuation Center is located at the Clifton Community Campus at 3270 D 1/2 Road, Clifton, CO.

Please note, this is not an overnight shelter. Evacuees will be assessed for needs and provided resources, such as housing, by resource navigators at this location.

For those with large animals who need assistance in securing shelter for their large animals please call 970-778-0161 to be connected with options and resources.

Per Mesa County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.
